title: US trademark opposition
content: A Shenzhen electronics brand plans to sell smart speakers in the US under the mark EchoNova. A prior US registration EchoNova Labs exists in class 9.
advice: Conduct clearance search and consider coexistence agreement or rebrand before launch.

title: FRAND and SEP risk in EU
content: A 5G IoT module exporter enters Germany and France without SEP licensing from major pools.
advice: Assess SEP exposure and negotiate pool licenses early to reduce injunction risk.

title: Software localization copyright
content: A game studio outsourced Japanese translation and later reused text in another title without explicit assignment.
advice: Verify assignment clauses and secure derivative work permissions.

title: Employee mobility leakage
content: US subsidiary hired competitors' engineers and imported source snippets from prior employer repositories.
advice: Implement clean-room protocol and legal hold review.

title: Phonetic similarity in India
content: A healthcare app named MediQ launches in India where Medique is registered for telemedicine services.
advice: File defensive marks and evaluate phonetic confusion risk in classes 9/42/44.

title: Battery management patent family
content: Company has core BMS algorithm and plans expansion to US and Canada.
advice: Start with US provisional, then PCT at 12 months and regional national phase selection.

title: Robotics control portfolio
content: SME develops collision-avoidance stack and wants Europe market entry in 18 months.
advice: File CN priority then EP route for broad coverage and utility model complement where available.

title: Medical imaging AI
content: AI startup seeks Japan hospital procurement opportunities.
advice: Draft method + system + computer program claims with Japanese translation quality control.

title: Semiconductor packaging
content: Advanced packaging process needs rapid filing before trade fair disclosure.
advice: Use accelerated examination and split continuation strategy.

title: Consumer brand expansion LATAM
content: Coffee chain enters Brazil and Mexico with bilingual logo.
advice: Apply Madrid baseline and local subclass checks for retail/services.

title: NPE infringement notice
content: A US NPE sent claim charts alleging e-commerce recommendation patent infringement.
advice: Perform non-infringement mapping and evaluate IPR/PTAB strategy.

title: German bifurcation risk
content: Automotive supplier sued in Munich for sensor patent; invalidity action filed separately.
advice: Prepare injunction defense and parallel nullity timeline management.

title: Passing off and confusion
content: SaaS entrant faces UK complaint for similar brand color and slogan.
advice: Collect evidence of distinctiveness and adjust branding assets quickly.

title: Cross-border content scraping
content: Media platform accused of scraping Singapore publisher articles.
advice: Takedown response and licensing negotiation pathway.

title: Former distributor misuse
content: Former US distributor retained confidential pricing playbooks and undercut channels.
advice: Seek TRO, forensic audit, and contract-based injunctive relief.

title: Open source + patent grant
content: Cloud startup used Apache-2.0 code and fears retaliation clause triggers under partner dispute.
advice: Map patent grant scope and contribution history.

title: Bad-faith filing abroad
content: Local reseller pre-filed company mark in Australia before principal entry.
advice: Initiate opposition or non-use cancellation while preserving distribution contracts.

title: Wearable industrial design
content: Hardware startup needs visual design protection for casing in US/EU/JP.
advice: Coordinate design filings within priority windows and align with product launch photos.

title: Customs seizure in France
content: Parallel imports detained under suspected trademark infringement.
advice: Prepare authenticity dossier and customs communication workflow.

title: Arabic transliteration conflict
content: E-commerce brand conflicts with existing Arabic transliteration in UAE.
advice: Evaluate bilingual mark strategy and local counsel review for transliteration equivalence.
